title: HP High Court Stenographer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
short_info: High Court of Himachal Pradesh (HP High Court) Stenographer Notification 2026 has been released on 21 May 2026 on the official website of the High Court of Himachal Pradesh. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the HP High Court Stenographer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate, Junior Scale Stenographer with required experience and stenography/typing speed
qualification.details: Graduate Junior Scale Stenographers working in the High Court and Graduate Junior Scale Stenographers working in the District Judiciary in H.P., with experience of one year in case of Junior Scale Stenographers of the High Court of H.P. and three years in case of Junior Scale Stenographers from the District Judiciary. Candidates must be having speed of 100 W.P.M., in English Stenography and accurate transcription of the matter dictated within a period of 5 times to the time allotted for dictation and typing speed, in English, at 50 W.P.M., on computers.

salary_details.details: Pay Level 11 i.e. Rs. 38,500-1,22,700/- of the Pay Matrix

selection_process: Stenography Test Typing Test Proficiency Test
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for HP High Court Stenographer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
